title: bergamotMC
description: enhanced vanilla gameplay focused on adventure and exploration for bergamotLabs
body:
**a kitchen sink modpack**
---
expand the vanilla experience with a little bit of everything: more structures, forgotten mobs, dark dimensions, and QOL improvements.

#### Notable Mods:

##### Gameplay
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- [Occultism](https://modrinth.com/mod/occultism)

##### Exploration
- [Dungeons and Taverns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns)
- [Towns and Towers](https://modrinth.com/mod/towns-and-towers)
- [When Dungeons Arise: Seven Seas](https://modrinth.com/mod/when-dungeons-arise-seven-seas)
- [Deeper and Darker](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker)
- [Stellaris](https://modrinth.com/mod/stellaris)

##### Mobs
- [Friends and Foes](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes-forge)
- [Fish of Thieves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fish-of-thieves)
- [Ribbits](https://modrinth.com/mod/ribbits)
- [Fowl Play](https://modrinth.com/mod/fowlplay)
- [Tide](https://modrinth.com/mod/tide)
  
  
_tested on [neoforge](https://neoforged.net/)_
